title: PreciousPiles
description: Small Mod to put your precious ingots as piles into your world. Sneak & right-click with at least 8 ingots in hand. One Block can hold a stack of ingots.
body:
# PreciousPiles...

... is a small mod that let's you place ingots 🍫 and bricks into the world 💰 (8 at a time) by shift & right-clicking 🖱 with the item in hand.

They can only be placed on solid faces 🧱 or other (full) stacked ingot blocks and will drop the ingots when the block below is destroyed 💥 - or when mined by a pickaxe. ⛏️

I've updated the placement method. You should have more possibilities placing the ingots in world. The lower half still needs to be filled first.

## With this mod...

... you can display your precious ingots with 64 ingots in one block space - time to update the treasure vault. 💲🪙

... you can build contraptions (with for example falling sand) that lets ingots rain from above, if certain blocks are destroyed.

💰💰💰💰💰

🟨🟨🟨🟨🟨

🟫 <- destroy this for profit.

## I'm planning... 

... to add an oxidized copper version. 💚

... maybe change the hardness of my ingot blocks. Especially the netherite version is maybe a little too hard to break. For now they have the same hardness as their vanilla full block counterparts and they also need a pickaxe to be broken (wood pickaxe is good enough though).

... to give ingame indications where the next little ingot pile can be placed next.

I don't plan to add mod support - or at least not in the near future.

Let me know, if you find any bugs or have any (small) suggestions. 😃
